name: RABBIT-FILE-BACKLOG-13
title: Housekeeping wave 1: retry count spec drift + script docstring metadata + dead-comment cleanup + bootstrap test extensions
description:
Bundled housekeeping items for rabbit-file (companion to BUG-35 frontmatter fix in the same cycle).

MEDIUM:
(M9) spec.md says push-retry budget is 'currently 8' but branch_ops.py:66 sets _MAX_PUSH_ATTEMPTS = 16. Update spec to 'currently 16'. One-line edit.

(M10) Scripts file-item.py + item-status.py + list-items.py missing module docstrings + Version/Owner/Deprecation criterion lines per spec-rules section 3. Only branch_ops.py has any docstring (still incomplete). Add minimal 4-line metadata header to each script.

LOW:
(F4) test_branch_auto_initialized rewritten per BACKLOG-12 covers success path only. Spec says misconfigured local origin will 'surface a normal git error on first push attempt' — testable but not tested. Add small e2e: set origin to non-existent local path, assert allocate_id raises RuntimeError with non-empty stderr. Locks the invariant the BACKLOG-12 spec edit asserts.

(F5) branch_ops.py:174-179 _worktree docstring still says 'set up git worktree at .claude/tmp/bug-backlog-files' — the legacy fixed-path string spec explicitly forbids (BUG-34 invariant). All code uses per-pid path correctly; only docstring is stale. One-line: append '-<pid>'.

(F6) item.json schema validation: spec lists fields (name, type, title, status, ...) but no script validates shape on read. fetch_item returns whatever JSON loads. Either add validation or add one-line spec note that schema is trusted. Lean: add spec note (cheaper, matches current behavior).

(F7 — info only, not actionable): worst-case 48 push attempts per filing under contention (counter+item+sha-backfill x 16 each). Note in spec only — not actionable without real contention measurements.

Acceptance: spec retry count matches code, scripts carry metadata header, _worktree docstring fixed, bootstrap negative test added, schema-trust noted in spec.

history.note: TDD cycle complete (secondary item resolved by same commit)
